en_title: 007 First Light Composers Reveal the One Rule They Were Given for Scoring the New Bond Game
cn_title: 《007 初露锋芒》作曲师揭秘新邦德游戏配乐的唯一规则

paragraphs.cn: 更新时间：2026年5月28日 00:01 UTC（北京时间5月28日上午8:01）

paragraphs.en: It's one of the most iconic musical themes in pop culture history: a plucky guitar riff that explodes into a symphony of brass. You probably know it well, even if you've never seen a James Bond movie or played a 007 game. And now the iconic Bond theme is back in the spotlight thanks in no small part to video game music veterans The Flight. I spoke with the duo, composed of bandmates Alexis Smith and Joe Henson, ahead of the release of IO Interactive's 007 First Light to talk about the challenges of building a new score around such a classic theme and the surprising lack of rules they encountered while scoring the game.
paragraphs.cn: 这是流行文化史上最具标志性的音乐主题之一：一段铿锵有力的吉他即兴，骤然爆发为铜管交响。即便你从未看过詹姆斯·邦德电影、也从未玩过007游戏，你也很可能熟悉它。如今这首经典的邦德主题再度回到聚光灯下——而这背后离不开游戏音乐资深组合The Flight。在IO Interactive开发的《007 初露锋芒》发售前，我采访了由Alexis Smith和Joe Henson组成的这一双人组合，与他们谈了围绕这样一首经典主题创作新配乐时的挑战，以及他们在配乐过程中所遇到的「出乎意料地没有什么规则」。

paragraphs.en: "The main thing from IO Interactive was to hold back those [big orchestral] moments to give it to the player when he's earned it," Henson says. "Other than that, we weren't being pushed into any boxes. There definitely wasn't a style guide that came in from outside saying, 'This is how you should use this.' Sonically, how we used that main theme, there weren't really any rules."
paragraphs.cn: 「IO Interactive最主要的要求是，要把那些（宏大管弦乐）时刻收着用，等到玩家通过自身努力赢得它的时候再交给玩家。」Henson说。「除此之外，他们没有把我们框死。绝对没有谁拿一份外部的风格指南来告诉我们『你们应该这样用』。在声音层面、在如何运用主题旋律方面，几乎没有任何规则。」

paragraphs.en: "The game is split into different locations, and we gave each of these locations a sound," Smith says. "Bond is brass, Bond is strings. But we, being The Flight, are always trying to push modernity as well because this is a modern take on Bond. So we've got to use electronics, use synths and stuff like that in a tasteful way. I feel that is kind of our specialty."
paragraphs.cn: 「游戏被分成了若干不同的地点，我们为每一个地点都定义了一种声音。」Smith说，「邦德是铜管，邦德是弦乐。但我们作为The Flight，总是在试图加入现代元素，因为这是对邦德的现代演绎。所以我们必须以一种有品味的方式使用电子元素和合成器之类的东西。我觉得这正是我们的专长。」

paragraphs.en: The Flight, who have also scored games like Gotham Knights, Assassin's Creed Shadows, and Horizon Zero Dawn, say they worked with 007 First Light theme song creators Lana del Ray and David Arnold to ensure the song's melody would reach beyond the opening credits.
paragraphs.cn: The Flight还为《哥谭骑士》《刺客信条：影》和《地平线：零之曙光》等游戏作过曲。他们表示与《007 初露锋芒》主题曲创作者Lana del Ray和David Arnold有过深度合作，确保主题曲的旋律能够延伸到开场字幕之外。

paragraphs.en: "We used Lana and David's [song] at very specific emotional points," Smith says. The first time you hear [that melody] is very early on. It's kind of Bond's rebirth. It looks like he's dead. [But then] he is reborn."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们在非常特定的情绪节点使用了Lana和David的歌曲，」Smith说，「你第一次听到那段旋律是在非常早的时候，那是邦德的某种重生。看起来他似乎死了，（但随后）他又重生了。」

paragraphs.en: "Then there are some points much later on in the game where you hear it also," Henson says. "When he does his first kill. And then at the end, [but] we don't want to spoil too much."
paragraphs.cn: 「然后在游戏后期还有一些时刻你会再次听到。」Henson说，「当他完成第一次击杀的时候。还有就是在最后，（但）我们不想剧透太多。」

paragraphs.en: The duo says they grew up watching 1980s Bond films starring Timothy Dalton, but it was a later film that cemented their love of the franchise and all of its musical history.
paragraphs.cn: 两人表示他们是看着1980年代由提摩西·道尔顿主演的邦德电影长大的，但真正让他们对这一系列及其全部音乐历史产生热爱的是后来的一部电影。

paragraphs.en: "When I was 10, we were watching Living Daylights at Christmastime," Smith says. "But [1995's] GoldenEye [sung by Tina Turner] was always the song that I latched onto. [It] came out just as I was coming into the music industry. It's a big song that still sounds so good. It still sounds modern. You could play it in a new Bond film and it would be absolutely fine."
paragraphs.cn: 「我10岁那年圣诞节，我们看了《007之黎明生机》，」Smith说，「但（1995年）由蒂娜·特纳演唱的《黄金眼》才是我一直心心念念的那首歌。它问世的时候，正好是我刚踏入音乐行业的时候。这是一首大歌，至今听起来依然出色，依然现代。把它放在一部新的邦德电影里依然完全合拍。」

paragraphs.en: Despite scoring numerous AAA games, both Henson and Smith say composing music for 007 First Light presented some unique challenges.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管为众多3A大作配过乐，Henson和Smith都表示，为《007 初露锋芒》作曲带来了一些独特的挑战。

paragraphs.en: "A game score is much longer an experience than a lot of films," Smith says. "So you need more of everything. It's very difficult to string out just the Bond theme throughout all that music. It would get boring and you definitely don't want to overuse that Bond theme that everyone knows. At least half of the score, if not 60%, is interactive music. It's music that can move between states depending on what the player's doing. From sneaking around to massive spectacle moments. Sometimes with [game] scoring, you've just got to imagine it and then write it."
paragraphs.cn: 「游戏配乐是一种比许多电影都要漫长得多的体验，」Smith说，「所以方方面面都需要更多。如果只是把邦德主题贯穿始终是非常困难的，会让人感到无聊，而且你绝对不会想过度使用那段所有人都耳熟能详的邦德主题。整部配乐至少有一半，甚至60%是互动音乐——音乐能根据玩家正在做的事情，在不同状态之间切换。从潜行到大场面时刻都是如此。有时候做游戏配乐，你必须先想象它，然后再写出来。」

paragraphs.en: "We've done a lot of open world games, so [007 First Light] is very different to that," Henson says. "It was a lot more scripted and a lot more guided for us. It was a hybrid film and game. [IO Interactive] has been talking about how the game works where you have playgrounds, then cinematic moments, and epic moments. And we wrote [the music] in basically the same way."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们做过很多开放世界游戏，所以《007 初露锋芒》和那些非常不一样。」Henson说，「这部作品对我们来说要更具脚本化、引导性也更强。它是电影与游戏的混合体。IO Interactive一直在谈论游戏的运作方式——有自由活动空间、电影式的演出时刻、史诗时刻——而我们在创作音乐时基本上也遵循了同样的结构。」

paragraphs.en: "We didn't train at a film school or anything like that," Smith says. "We started as musicians making dance music, being in a band, making pop music. So we [came] into working on games from that angle and learned the orchestral language along the way. So that's what we wanted to keep. We wanted to keep where we've come from. [But] obviously we have a big responsibility to the Bond score. It's always got to sound like Bond."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们从未在电影学院之类的地方接受过培训。」Smith说，「我们最初是做舞曲音乐的乐手，组过乐队、做过流行音乐。我们就是从这个角度进入游戏配乐领域的，并在过程中逐渐学习管弦乐的语言。这是我们想要保留的东西，我们想保留我们从哪里来的特质。（但）显然我们对邦德配乐肩负着重大责任，它必须始终听起来像邦德。」
